{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221902205FC336B2037EAD7535C1"}"},"total":597},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7347242430729585433","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"你大家都觉得不对不对不对不对就"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710665348,"group_id":"7114603144151043072","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105181825206718"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7114603144151043072","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"28"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6486,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22267,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7237731288643617595","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好，短小精悍，女主个性鲜明，就喜欢这种风格，但作者可以把一些不太好的地方改进一下，偷偷说一句，男女主有点像女将星里的。都是将军这一点看起来很爽，女主果断，男主也是，不拖沓。总之就是一句话，喜欢看这类的可以入","text_exts":[{"e":57,"s":54,"text":"女将星","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%B3%E5%B0%86%E6%98%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177340AD7535C1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227237731288643617595%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227114603144151043072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%B3%E5%B0%86%E6%98%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685165773,"group_id":"7114603144151043072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿你如九天星辰，不染世俗","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Fz/LdIfXj4jRYYXvRtduI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6e54b9acfe834deabb96927eda0e35b5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709059&x-signature=sNaTySo9JANMhdwEzaJpxcYrg68%3D","user_id":"105181825206718","user_name":"遇而"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105181825206718","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7114603144151043072","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝落败，十万军中无敌手的祁悯被楚彧生擒。
楚彧这才发现，一直与他势均力敌针锋相对的祁将军。
原来，是个小姑娘。　　
　　“一身转战三千里，一剑曾当百万师。”世人只知收复边境领土威名天下的祁将军，却不知祁悯风光下颠颠簸簸的人生。
　　祁悯穿越到对女子约束最为苛刻的庆国，但她不愿沉沦于这无情世道，自成羽翼，习得无双剑术。
　　十四岁那年，兄长坠崖、父亲被斩，庞大的家族一夜之间被灭门。风灯零乱，十几年的亲情是斩不断的，她听见冤魂日日夜夜在哭，终于决定扛起复仇的重任。
　　她下了一盘很大的棋，自己却也在棋局中迷失。
　　是楚彧将她拉出迷雾，给了她最渴求的安全感，他说，祁悯，这下，本将军连心都输给你了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o90fea72aea7f4e0bbd22f760b4e71861~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"诗尾","author_id":"","book_id":"7114603144151043072","book_name":"祈明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2490人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":492,"name":"将军","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=492&name=将军&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":388,"name":"女扮男装","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=388&name=女扮男装&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7114604277531836940","read_count":"2490","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"199789"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"105","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,将军,女强,女扮男装,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o90fea72aea7f4e0bbd22f760b4e71861~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361340&x-signature=M4XfJ1fTuhf7vdbbAoWJnNOM0fY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1434224660866248","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.3276674e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221902205FC336B2037EAD7535C1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4021,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17297,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5871},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7151007624903934727","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"祁悯这样的女子，就是我的心之所向，作者真的写得很好，书中的角色有血有肉，战场的残酷，官场中的权谋，表达的很好，就像他们真实的存在一样，好书是会引起共鸣的，我看得见所有阴暗与诋毁，可那又怎么样呢，我大方坦然的接受，永远唾弃，并且坚定的捂住耳朵永远自由，永远向前走……

我本女儿志在四方，何惧世俗历沧桑，女子不应该被世俗所束缚，要永远自由如风永远为自己着迷，相信其实你还不错，你比想象中更厉害一点，很多时候你都自己一个人走过来了，你很棒别怀疑！我们更不应该去依附着别人活着，去发光而不是被照亮……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664973773,"group_id":"7114603144151043072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"柔软 勇敢 不将就.","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2aFEzzJNaEfgHlU9RtlYVM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7068b970ef3d42e281c3884d28aca44f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707007&x-signature=GQFph6OAy%2Bpr7mrqYrqa5pv2jqM%3D","user_id":"68194132040","user_name":"我是小陈耶💤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"68194132040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1720419608,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7114603144151043072","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝落败，十万军中无敌手的祁悯被楚彧生擒。
